nouns.summary: Σαλμὼν is described as having “begotten” a son (Βόες) from Ῥαχάβ.
Βόες is described as having “begotten” a son (Ἰωβὴδ) from Ῥούθ.
Ῥαχάβ is identified as the mother from whom Σαλμὼν “begot” Βόες.
Ἰωβὴδ is described as having “begotten” Ἰεσσαί.
Ῥούθ is identified as the mother from whom Βόες “begot” Ἰωβὴδ.
Ἰεσσαί is mentioned as the son who was “begotten” by Ἰωβὴδ.
